questions: samudra theke plastic kivabe tolha hoy?
tell me about ocean cleanup efforts
answers: Ocean cleanup refers to efforts to remove plastic and other debris from the world's oceans. The Ocean Cleanup project by Boyan Slat is one of the most well-known initiatives.
Ocean cleanup holo samudra theke plastic ar debris remove korar efforts. Great Pacific Garbage Patch e onek plastic joma hoyeche ja clean up kora dorkar.
The Ocean Cleanup organization uses large floating barriers to collect plastic from ocean garbage patches. They also deploy Interceptors in rivers to stop plastic before it reaches the ocean.

Ocean cleanup is challenging because debris spreads across millions of square kilometers. Solutions include barrier systems, drone boats, beach cleanups, and most importantly, preventing plastic from entering oceans.
